title: Quick Insights from Spreadsheets
prompt:
"I have a spreadsheet with [describe: e.g., monthly sales for 12 months].
Please help me:
1. Identify the top 3 trends
2. Create 3 simple charts for my manager
3. Explain any unusual patterns in plain language
4. Suggest 2 questions I should investigate further

Data: [paste or describe]"
best_for: First-time analysts, small datasets, quick summaries
source: Mike's F9 Finance — "ChatGPT Just Replaced Hours of FP&A Work"

title: Rolling Forecast Model
prompt:
"I need to build a rolling forecast model for [product line/region].

Current situation:
- Historical data: [describe]
- Planning horizon: [e.g., 12 months]
- Key drivers: [seasonality, promotions, market trends]
- Constraints: [budget, headcount, etc.]

Please help me:
1. Design the forecast structure
2. Suggest the best Excel/Google Sheets layout
3. Create formulas for key calculations
4. Identify risks and sensitivities
5. Build a variance analysis template

Output as a step-by-step implementation guide."
best_for: FP&A analysts, business controllers, budget managers
source: Mike's F9 Finance — "ChatGPT Just Replaced Hours of FP&A Work"

title: Automated FP&A Pipeline
prompt:
"I'm building an automated FP&A pipeline using Python. The system needs to:

1. Ingest data from [ERP/source system]
2. Clean and validate financial data
3. Run predictive models for [forecast type]
4. Generate automated reports (PowerPoint/Excel)
5. Alert on anomalies
6. Maintain audit trail

Current tech stack: [your tools]
Data sources: [list]
Pain points: [describe manual work]

Please provide:
- System architecture
- Python code skeleton with error handling
- Data validation rules
- Testing strategy
- Deployment approach
- Documentation template"
best_for: Data engineers, senior analysts, technical finance leads
source: Mike's F9 Finance — "ChatGPT Just Replaced Hours of FP&A Work"

title: AI-Assisted Variance Analysis
prompt:
"I just closed the month and need to explain budget vs. actual variances to my manager.

Data:
- Budget: [amount or file]
- Actual: [amount or file]
- Key categories: [list]
- Previous month: [for comparison]

Please help me:
1. Identify the top 5 variances (positive and negative)
2. Write 2-3 sentence explanations for each
3. Flag which ones need action vs. which are noise
4. Draft the email/update for my manager
5. Suggest follow-up questions to ask the business"

title: Automated Commentary Writing
prompt:
"I need to write monthly financial commentary for [report/steerco].

Data available:
- P&L summary
- Key metrics (revenue, margin, opex)

3. Use professional but concise language
4. Highlight red flags
5. Suggest graphics/tables to include"

title: AI-Powered Forecasting Assistant
prompt:
"I need to build/update a forecast with AI assistance.

Historical data:
- [X] months of actuals
- Seasonality patterns
- Known one-off events

Current forecast:
- Budget: [amount]
- Current projection: [amount]
- Risk factors: [list]

Please help me:
1. Analyze historical trends
2. Identify seasonality and patterns
3. Adjust for known events
4. Generate 3 scenarios (base/upside/downside)
5. Write the forecast narrative
6. Create summary for leadership

Output in structured format with formulas if applicable."
best_for: Business controllers, FP&A managers doing rolling forecasts
source: Inside FP&A — "How AI is Changing FP&A"

title: Financial Modeling with AI
prompt:
"I'm building a financial model for [purpose: M&A/new product/investment].

Requirements:
- 3-statement model (P&L, BS, CF)
- 5-year projection
- Sensitivity analysis
- Key assumptions clearly documented

Current stage: [blank template / partial model / needs review]

Please:
1. Structure the model layout
2. Build core formulas and drivers
3. Create assumption tables
4. Add sensitivity tables (±10%, ±20%)
5. Build summary dashboard
6. Add error checks and validations
7. Write documentation

Format: [Excel/Google Sheets]

Include:
- Color coding scheme
- Formula explanations
- Circularity handling
- Audit trail"
best_for: FP&A managers, corporate development, investment analysts
source: Mike's F9 Finance

title: Board Presentation Builder
prompt:
"I need to create a board/executive presentation on [financial topic].

Audience: [Board/CFO/CEO]

Key message: [one sentence]
Data available: [describe]

Please create:
1. Story arc (beginning, middle, end)
2. Slide-by-slide outline
3. Key charts/visuals to include
4. Speaker notes with timing
5. Appendix with backup data
6. Q&A preparation (anticipate 5 questions)

Make it:
- Executive-level (not operational)
- Visual and scannable
- Persuasive, not just informative
- Action-oriented"
best_for: Directors and VPs presenting to C-suite

source: OpenAI — "ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets"

title: Natural Language Excel Updates
prompt:
"Update the worksheet tab called @[TAB NAME] with the latest [data type] using [data source].

Example: 'Update the worksheet tab called @Balance Sheet - Q with the latest earnings print and transcript commentary using S&P Global'

Context:
- Workbook: [name]
- Tab: [specific tab]
- Data source: [S&P Global/Bloomberg/internal]
- Time period: [Q1/Q2/etc.]

Please:
1. Pull latest actuals and replace estimates
2. Update column headers (E → A for actual)
3. Add variance commentary
4. Verify checks = PASS
5. Log data sources"
best_for: FP&A analysts doing quarterly updates
source: OpenAI — "ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets"

title: AI-Assisted Financial Model Audit
prompt:
"Audit my financial model for consistency and errors.

Model details:
- Purpose: [DCF/3-statement/budget]
- Time horizon: [years]
- Key assumptions: [list]
- Check cells: [locations]

Please:
1. Verify assumption consistency and sign
2. Check formula links and circularities
3. Validate check cells = 0 or PASS
4. Identify broken links or #REF errors
5. Flag unusual patterns (e.g., margins jumping 50%)
6. Suggest improvements

Output: Audit report with severity ratings (Critical/Warning/Info)"
best_for: Senior analysts reviewing models before board submission
source: OpenAI — "ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets"

title: Power BI Model Optimization with AI
prompt:
"Analyze my Power BI model and optimize it.

Current state:
- Tables: [X]
- Measures: [X]
- Size: [X MB]
- Refresh time: [X minutes]

Please:
1. Analyze naming conventions and suggest renames
2. Add display folders to organize fields
3. Hide foreign key columns (show only friendly names)
4. Add descriptions to all measures and columns
5. Create user hierarchies for drill-down
6. Optimize data types for compression
7. Generate complete documentation

Output: Step-by-step implementation guide with DAX code"
best_for: BI developers, data modelers
source: Power BI Bro — "Claude + Power BI Integration via MCP"

title: Create Calculation Table with Measures
prompt: "Create a new empty table to hold calculations, create an aggregate amount calc for every [category] value, create a net calc, and also create a comprehensive group of monthly time intelligence measures for all measures created. Remove/hide any placeholder fields in the new table."
best_for: BI developers building semantic models
source: Power BI Bro — "Claude + Power BI Integration via MCP"

title: Cube Function Dashboard (Excel)
prompt:
"I want to build a custom dashboard using Excel Cube functions instead of PivotTables.

Data model: [Power Pivot / SSAS / Power BI]
Metrics needed: [list]
Layout requirements: [custom spacing, narration, totals]

Please:
1. Create CUBESET for each dimension (months, products, regions)
2. Use CUBEMEMBER for row/column labels
3. Use CUBEVALUE to pull calculated measures
4. Add CUBERANKEDMEMBER for Top N rankings
5. Apply conditional formatting with CUBEKPIMEMBER
6. Build flexible layout (not PivotTable rigid)

Provide: Complete formulas and layout guide"
best_for: FP&A analysts building custom financial dashboards
source: Finex Skills Hub — "Master 6 Excel Cube Functions"

title: AI-Powered BI Documentation Generator
prompt:
"Generate a Markdown document (.md) that provides complete, professional documentation for the [Power BI Semantic Model / Excel Data Model], including a data dictionary.

Requirements:
- Use a simple mermaid diagram to illustrate table relationships
- Document each measure including the DAX code and description of business logic
- Use business-friendly names
- Document data sources by analyzing the Power Query code
- Include executive summary, table of contents, model diagrams
- Add usage guidelines and reporting scenarios

Current model: [describe or attach .pbix]

Output: Enterprise-grade documentation (~60 pages)"
best_for: BI teams, Center of Excellence leads
source: Power BI Bro — "Claude + Power BI Integration via MCP"

title: Autonomous Workflow System
prompt:
"I want to build [X] proactive AI workflows that run automatically.

Example workflows to replicate:
1. Morning briefing (industry news, competitor updates)
2. Friday email recap (unresponded urgent emails ranked by urgency)
3. Weekly financial summary (variance analysis auto-generated)
4. Monday forecast update (rolling forecast refresh)

Provide:

4. Recommend tools (no-code/low-code)
5. Estimate effort and accuracy"

title: ML Model Build
prompt:
"Build an ML model for [demand forecasting/churn/etc.].

Data:
- Historical data: [time range, granularity]
- Features: [list]
- Target: [what to predict]

Requirements:
- Retrain monthly
- Explain predictions
- Confidence intervals
- Deploy to [environment]
- Monitor drift

Please provide:
1. Data preparation pipeline
2. Model selection and training
3. Evaluation framework
4. Deployment approach
5. Monitoring setup
6. Business metrics"

title: Enterprise ML Platform
prompt:
"Design an enterprise AI/ML platform.

Use cases across departments:
- Demand forecasting
- Customer segmentation
- Predictive maintenance
- Quality control
- Pricing optimization

Requirements:
- MLOps lifecycle
- Feature store
- Experiment tracking
- Model registry
- A/B testing
- Monitoring
- Governance
- Multi-cloud

Provide:
- Platform architecture
- Component selection
- Implementation roadmap
- Team and skills needed
- Cost model
- Success metrics"

title: Quick Market Scan
prompt:
"I need a quick overview of [market/industry].

Please:
1. List top 5 players
2. Describe market size and growth
3. Identify key trends
4. Note any recent news/developments
5. Suggest 3 sources to read deeper"

title: Deep Dive Report
prompt:
"I need a comprehensive market analysis of [industry] for [purpose].

Focus areas:
- Market size and forecast
- Competitive landscape
- Customer segments
- Technology trends
- Regulatory environment
- Entry barriers

Please create:
1. Executive summary
2. Market structure analysis
3. Competitor profiles (top 5)
4. Trend analysis
5. Opportunity assessment
6. Risk factors
7. Recommendations

Output as a professional report."

title: Competitor Profile
prompt:
"Create a detailed profile of [competitor company].

Include:
1. Company overview (size, history, ownership)
2. Product/service portfolio
3. Pricing strategy
4. Market position
5. Strengths and weaknesses
6. Recent strategic moves
7. Financial health (if public)
8. Threat level to us

Format as an intelligence brief."

title: Competitive Monitoring System
prompt:
"Build an automated competitive intelligence system that tracks:

1. Competitor website changes
2. Pricing updates
3. New product launches
4. Job postings (hiring signals)
5. Patent filings
6. Social media sentiment
7. Review trends

Alerts:
- Daily digest for minor changes
- Immediate alert for major changes

Deliverables:
- Weekly competitive brief
- Monthly strategic assessment
- Quarterly trend report

Provide:
- Data sources and APIs
- Scraping infrastructure
- Analysis pipeline
- Alert system
- Report templates"

title: Process Documentation
prompt:
"I need to document how to [task/process].

Audience: [new hires/team/customers]
Current knowledge: [tribal/exists in heads]

Please help me:
1. Create a step-by-step guide
2. Add screenshots/checkpoints
3. Include troubleshooting section
4. Make it scannable (bullet points)
5. Suggest where to store it"

title: Technical Documentation
prompt:
"I need technical documentation for [system/feature].

Audience: [developers/users/administrators]
Current state: [no docs/outdated/fragmented]

Please create:
1. Overview and architecture
2. Setup/installation guide
3. API reference (if applicable)
4. Usage examples
5. Troubleshooting guide
6. FAQ
7. Changelog template

Format: [Markdown/Confluence/Notion]"

title: Documentation Platform
prompt:
"Design a documentation strategy and platform for [company/product].

Current state:
- [Scattered/outdated/non-existent]
- Tools: [if any]

Requirements:
- Version control
- Search functionality
- Multi-format output (web/PDF)
- Contribution workflow
- Review process
- Analytics (what's read, what's not)
- Integration with support tickets

Please provide:
- Information architecture
- Tool selection and setup
- Writing standards/style guide
- Maintenance process
- Migration plan (if needed)"

title: Slide Content
prompt:
"I need to create a presentation about [topic] for [audience].

Duration: [X minutes]
Key message: [one sentence]
Data: [what you have]

Please:
1. Create an outline (title + 3-5 sections)
2. Write speaker notes
3. Suggest visuals/charts
4. Recommend slide count
5. Provide opening and closing statements"

title: Presentation Design
prompt:
"Design a compelling presentation for [purpose].

Context:
- Audience: [describe]
- Stake in outcome: [what they care about]
- Time: [X minutes]
- Format: [in-person/remote]

Please create:
1. Narrative arc (beginning, middle, end)
2. Slide-by-slide storyboard
3. Data visualization recommendations
4. Speaker notes with timing
5. Q&A preparation (anticipate 5 questions)
6. Handout design

Make it persuasive, not just informative."

title: Automated Presentation Generation
prompt:
"Build a system that generates presentations from [data source].

Requirements:
- Pull data from [database/API/spreadsheet]
- Auto-generate charts and visuals
- Apply brand template
- Create narrative from data insights
- Export to PowerPoint/Google Slides
- Schedule automatic updates

Use cases:
- Monthly board reports
- Weekly sales updates
- Quarterly business reviews

Provide:
- System architecture
- Template design system
- Data-to-slide mapping
- Automation pipeline
- Quality checks"

title: Email Templates
prompt:
"I need email templates for [situation].

Please create:
1. Initial outreach
2. Follow-up after no response
3. Meeting request
4. Thank you after meeting
5. Status update

Tone: [professional/friendly/urgent]
Keep them short and actionable."

title: Communication Strategy
prompt:
"I need to communicate [change/decision/update] to [audience].

Context:
- What's changing: [describe]
- Why: [reason]
- Impact: [who's affected and how]
- Timeline: [when]
- Concerns: [what people will worry about]

Please help me:
1. Craft the core message
2. Create an FAQ (10 questions)
3. Design a communication timeline
4. Write for different channels (email, meeting, doc)
5. Plan for feedback and resistance
6. Create a feedback loop"
